From our hearts to yours

A Message of Love

✦

Some meetings are not accidents — they are destiny written in starlight.

Patitapabana and Sasmita found in each other what every heart quietly searches for: a safe home, a kind gaze, a love that needs no translation.

As they begin their journey together, we — from the groom's family — open our arms and our hearts to welcome all those who have loved and shaped this beautiful soul.

Come, share in our joy. Your blessing is the greatest gift you could bring.
